footer.description: Human-centered cybersecurity solutions designed specifically for SMEs. Making security accessible, actionable, and calm.
footer.copyright: MediteraSec. All rights reserved. Pursuing the pre-label Startup Act in Tunisia.

home.heroTitle: Cybersecurity built for small businesses without the complexity or cost.
home.heroSubtitle: Pulse monitors your network and devices 24/7, detects intrusions automatically, and shows you what's happening in plain language. No security team required.
home.whatIsPulseDesc1: Pulse is a hybrid intrusion detection system that watches both your network traffic and your devices at the same time.
home.whatIsPulseDesc2: It combines rule-based detection with AI-powered anomaly detection, and presents alerts in a simple dashboard anyone can understand.
home.companyDescription: specifically for small and medium businesses in Tunisia and similar markets who need real cybersecurity, without the enterprise price tag or the need for in-house expertise.
home.coreSubtitle: Security that works for you, not the other way around.
home.core1Desc: Pulse watches your network and devices and alerts you the moment suspicious activity appears.
home.core2Desc: Each alert is explained in plain language with context, so you don't need to be a security expert to act on it.
home.core3Desc: Designed for resource-constrained SME environments, Pulse installs without heavy infrastructure.
home.core4Desc: Machine learning models catch novel attacks that rule-based systems miss.
home.proofDesc: Pulse's ML model achieves high detection accuracy on network intrusion events, with a false positive rate low enough for a team of one to handle alerts.
home.trust1Desc: Born from rigorous engineering research and technical excellence at MedTech.
home.trust2Desc: Currently enrolling in the Tunisian Startup Act pre-label process to join the national tech ecosystem.
home.trust3Desc: Tested and refined in real-world SME environments in partnership with WeMake.

about.title: About MediteraSec
about.subtitle: Human-centered security for the modern age.
about.missionTitle: Security shouldn't be reserved for massive enterprises with dedicated SOCs.
about.missionSubtitle: We believe sophisticated protection shouldn't be a luxury. MediteraSec was born from the realization that while enterprise security exists, most small businesses are left vulnerable due to complexity and cost. We are bridge-building between high-level research and practical, everyday security.
about.focusSubtitle: From academic research to real-world protection.
about.storyDesc: MediteraSec started at MedTech, driven by a simple question: How can we make advanced intrusion detection accessible to businesses without a dedicated security team? Through months of research and performance benchmarking, Pulse was developed as a direct answer to that question.
about.stageDesc: We are an early-stage cybersecurity startup based in Tunisia. Currently pursuing the Startup Act pre-label, we are in the early access phase, working closely with partners like WeMake to refine Pulse for wider deployment.
about.teamSubtitle: Building the future of accessible security.
about.founderBio: Nedim is a software engineer and MedTech alumnus with a deep focus on intelligent cybersecurity. What started as a capstone research project evolved into MediteraSec after successful testing and deployment at WeMake. He is dedicated to building security tools specifically for the Tunisian and North African SME market.

partnership.heroSubtitle: We are looking for strategic partners to refine and deploy Pulse across North Africa. Join us in making advanced defense accessible.
partnership.offerDesc: Access to Pulse IDS technology, real-world intrusion data for research, and a platform ready for integration with existing SME IT services.
partnership.askDesc: We're seeking MSSPs, IT service providers for SMEs, and academic researchers focused on AI-driven network security to test and validate Pulse in diverse environments.
partnership.area1Desc: Integrating Pulse into existing SME service packages to provide immediate security value to your clients.
partnership.area2Desc: Testing our ML models against your specific infrastructure traffic to refine detection accuracy and reduce false positives.
partnership.area3Desc: Collaborating on papers and benchmarks to advance the state of the art in human-centered intrusion detection.
partnership.ctaFooterTitle: Ready to shape the future of SME security?

pulse.heroSubtitle: An intelligent intrusion detection platform designed to make cybersecurity more accessible, adaptive, and effective.
pulse.heroFocus: Host-based and network-aware threat detection powered by machine learning and real-time monitoring.
pulse.whatIsDesc1: Pulse is an intrusion detection platform developed by MediteraSec to help organizations monitor, analyze, and respond to suspicious activity across modern digital environments.
pulse.whatIsDesc2: The platform combines host-based monitoring, network traffic analysis, and machine learning-driven anomaly detection to identify potential threats in real time.
pulse.whatIsDesc3: Designed with usability in mind, Pulse focuses on reducing unnecessary complexity and making advanced security technologies more accessible to modern teams.
pulse.step1Desc: Lightweight agents on hosts collect system logs while a network sensor (Suricata + custom ML) monitors traffic patterns.
pulse.step2Desc: Events are pushed via MQTT to a stacked XGBoost ensemble that classifies threats with 97%+ accuracy.
pulse.step3Desc: Insights appear in a React dashboard with GeoIP mapping, IOC badges, and MITRE ATT&CK tags.
pulse.whyDesc1: Born out of a MedTech research project and refined at WeMake, Pulse was built to bridge the security gap for SMEs in Tunisia. We saw traditional tools were too complex and expensive for small businesses.
pulse.whyDesc2: Our goal is to create security technology that is technically capable, scalable, and easier to adopt in real-world environments without needing a dedicated SOC.
pulse.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your security needs. Start for free, upgrade as you grow.
pulse.freeTierDesc: For individual researchers and small labs.
pulse.proTierDesc: Full protection for SMEs and startups.
pulse.waitlistSubtitle: Be among the first to experience Pulse. Help us shape the future of accessible security.
pulse.waitlistSuccessDesc: Thank you for joining. We'll be in touch soon with exclusive updates.
pulse.ctaBottomTitle: Ready to explore intelligent threat detection?

contact.subtitle: Have questions about Pulse or want to explore a partnership? We're here to help you navigate the future of SME security.
contact.infoDesc: Reach out to us directly or fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our team will get back to you shortly.
